desensitize.addRuleHint: Click "Add Rule" to create a desensitization rule
desensitize.name: Name
knowledge.complianceAnalogyDetail: Archiving company emails is legal, but using email content to evaluate employees requires additional legal basis (such as employment contract terms). Similarly, the knowledge base can only be used for knowledge extraction purposes; usage beyond that scope requires additional legal and management authorization.
knowledge.complianceLegal: This statement is formulated in accordance with Article 27 of the Data Security Law and Enterprise Data Asset Management specifications, applicable to all employees using the company API gateway (wr-proxy).
knowledge.complianceLegal1: Extract business knowledge from conversations to build an enterprise knowledge base
knowledge.complianceLegal2: Categorize by department for easy retrieval and knowledge reuse
knowledge.complianceLegal3: For agent MCP invocation, improving work efficiency
knowledge.complianceLegal4: Assist business decision-making and organizational knowledge accumulation
knowledge.complianceObligationDetail: Although not "personal information", the enterprise has an obligation to protect data in the system from leakage and prevent unauthorized access to the knowledge base. All operations are recorded in audit logs and subject to periodic reviews.
knowledge.complianceProhibit1: Must not use conversation content to evaluate employee workload or performance
knowledge.complianceProhibit2: Must not be used to monitor whether employees are doing personal matters during work hours (disguised labor monitoring)
knowledge.complianceProhibit3: Must not provide conversation content to third parties (non-business purposes)
knowledge.compliancePurposeDesc: This statement clarifies the authorized usage boundaries of the enterprise knowledge base. All relevant personnel shall strictly comply.
knowledge.complianceRetentionDetail: Original conversation data is deleted immediately after knowledge extraction is completed. Knowledge entries have retention periods (retention_until) and are automatically cleaned up after expiration. The periodic cleanup task runs every 6 hours.
knowledge.complianceScope1: The captured objects are business conversations on the company API gateway, not employees' personal information
knowledge.complianceScope2: Conversation content undergoes desensitization processing (ID cards, phone numbers, emails, bank cards etc. are automatically replaced with markers)
knowledge.complianceScope3: Original conversations are stored with length truncation and deleted immediately after knowledge extraction is completed
knowledge.complianceScope4: Extracted knowledge entries have an automatic expiration and cleanup mechanism
knowledge.complianceSecurity1: The knowledge base implements department data isolation; each department can only access its own data
knowledge.complianceSecurity2: Knowledge injection uses read-only mode to prevent unauthorized modification
knowledge.complianceSecurity3: All critical operations (capture, extraction, access, config changes) are recorded in audit logs
knowledge.complianceTitle: 📋 Internal Notice — API Gateway Knowledge Capture Statement
knowledge.complianceWhatDetail: The company API gateway (wr-proxy) automatically captures conversation content when employees use the company AI API for business conversations, and extracts enterprise business knowledge (such as business data, process specifications, analysis conclusions, etc.) from them via LLM, storing it in the enterprise knowledge base.
knowledge.complianceWhyDetail: This is of the same nature as company email archiving, customer service call recording, and ERP data entry — the enterprise has the right to manage business data generated on its own infrastructure. By extracting and accumulating business knowledge scattered across various conversations, organizational knowledge reuse efficiency can be improved to assist business decision-making.
knowledge.confirmEnable:
Enable the enterprise knowledge base?

Once enabled, conversation content will be automatically captured and knowledge extracted.
All data is desensitized and stored only in the local database.
knowledge.confirmMergeIrreversible: Merge "{code}" into "{target}"? This action is irreversible.
knowledge.dataLocal: All data is stored only in the local database and will not be transmitted externally.
knowledge.domainCodeNameRequired: Domain code and name are required
knowledge.extractDesc: Automatically extract structured knowledge entries from raw conversations (wr_knowledge_raw).
knowledge.extractDetail: LLM will evaluate the knowledge value of each conversation and extract it as factual/analytical/procedural type knowledge.
knowledge.extracting: Extracting, please wait (may take a few minutes)...
knowledge.mergeHint: After merging, all knowledge entries under "{code}" will be migrated to the target domain, and the current domain will be marked as merged.
knowledge.onboardingDesc: Once enabled, the system will automatically capture conversations passing through this gateway, desensitize them, and refine them into reusable structured knowledge via AI. Relevant background information will be automatically injected into subsequent conversations to improve response quality.
knowledge.reviewEmpty: Review queue is empty, all knowledge entries have been reviewed
knowledge.selectItemsFirst: Please select items to approve first
knowledge.title: Enterprise Knowledge Base
login.title: WebRouter Admin Login

providers.addProviderHint: Click "Add Data Source" to start managing your API resources
providers.enterBaseUrl: Please enter a Base URL first
providers.fallbackHint: When channels are configured, all channels failing will fall back to the Provider's own API Key. Disable to use only configured channels.
providers.modelsUnlimitedHint: Leave empty for unlimited, supporting all models from this Provider
providers.title: 🔌 Data Source Management
settings.alertConfigRequired: At least configure WeChat SendKey or SMTP address
settings.alertNotifyHint: Configure WeChat and Email alert channels. Selected channels will be used automatically in the "Alert Rules" page.
settings.codeDetectionDesc: Detect whether messages contain code features (code blocks, function definitions, classes, etc.). Programming tasks typically require stronger reasoning capabilities.
settings.complexityConfig: 🎯 Smart Model Selection — Complexity Assessment Config
settings.complexityHint: Six independent scoring dimensions, total score determines model grade. Click Reload wr-proxy after modifying config to take effect.
settings.complexitySaved: Complexity config saved, please click Reload wr-proxy to take effect
settings.complexityTitle: 🎯 Smart Model Selection — Complexity Assessment Config
settings.confirmResetComplexity: Restore default complexity config? Current custom settings will be overwritten.
settings.dynamicContentLastDesc: Move dynamic content (URLs, timestamps, random numbers, etc.) in user messages to the end, improving prompt cache hit rate.
settings.dynamicContentLastDetail: When enabled, wr-proxy will reorder the messages array in the request body: move messages containing dynamic content (URLs, dates, numbers, etc.) to the end of the same role group, keeping the prompt prefix as static as possible to improve upstream prompt cache hit rate. Suitable for fixed system prompt + dynamic user input scenarios.
settings.featureHint: The following features are wr-proxy advanced optimization functions. When enabled, the request body will be automatically processed before forwarding to the upstream to optimize token usage and cache hit rate. Click the Reload button after modifying toggles to take effect.
settings.gatewayDescription: Admin panel communication URL with wr-proxy, and the external API gateway address for user calls.
settings.gatewayUrlHint: API address displayed in member invitation emails and documentation
settings.healthTestHint: Used for direct Provider health checks. Matches test endpoint and request body by domain in base_url.
settings.inputLengthDesc: Score by total character count of request messages. Longer input means greater processing difficulty and higher likelihood of needing a stronger model.
settings.multiTurnDesc: Score by conversation turns. More turns means more context understanding is needed, better suited for stronger models.
settings.proxyUrlHint: Flask internal connection address to wr-proxy
settings.reasoningKeywordsDesc: Check whether the last user message contains reasoning/analysis keywords (such as "analyze", "principle", "reasoning", etc.). A hit indicates the task requires stronger reasoning capabilities.
settings.restoreSuccess: Restore successful, please refresh the page
settings.retentionDaysError: Retention days must be a positive integer
settings.sessionCompressionDesc: Compress history messages in multi-turn conversations, merging early messages into summaries.
settings.sessionCompressionDetail: When conversation turns exceed the threshold, early messages are merged into summaries to reduce the context length of subsequent requests. Suitable for long conversation scenarios (e.g. customer service, teaching assistants), compressing dozens of turns into a few summary turns. Note: compression loses some detail, suitable for scenarios where context precision is not critical. When enabled, configure compression threshold and model (see settings below).
settings.smtpConfigRequired: Please configure SMTP settings first (server address, username, password, recipient)
settings.smtpFrom: Sender Address (leave empty to use username)
settings.smtpPasswordHint: Email password or app-specific password (use authorization code for QQ Mail)
settings.smtpToRequired: Recipient is required when SMTP address is configured
settings.systemPromptDesc: Check the length of the system prompt. Overly long system prompts typically contain complex instructions or role definitions, requiring stronger models to follow.
settings.title: ⚙️ System Settings
settings.tokenCompressionDesc: Pre-compress system prompts and long context to reduce input token count.
settings.tokenCompressionDetail: Before the request is sent upstream, a lightweight model (e.g. qwen-turbo) first summarizes long text to reduce input token count. Suitable for scenarios with long system prompts (>4000 tokens), significantly reducing call costs but losing some context precision. When enabled, additional compression model configuration is required (see settings below).
settings.toolsDetectionDesc: Detect whether the request contains tools or functions fields. Using tool calls typically indicates more complex task planning, requiring stronger models.
